subcodes.first_line: In this day the world is illumined by the effulgent rays of the Sun of Manifestation—a Day whereof no likeness can be found in all the Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز عالم بانوار آفتاب ظهور منور این یوم را شبه و مثل نبوده و در جمیع کتب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
